hook.name: GPO Hook (Base)
hook.description: An immutable, ownerless Uniswap v4 hook for the GoldPesa Option (GPO) token that deploys GPO, seeds a full-range liquidity position, and enforces a 10% USDC fee on every swap via BeforeSwapDelta and AfterSwapDelta. Liquidity is permanently locked after initial minting, and donations and unauthorized pool initialization are blocked.
